title: Bonnetia colombiana
taxonomy: Bonnetia colombiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Bonnetiaceae. It belongs to the genus Bonnetia, which includes several species of plants native to the Americas. The family Bonnetiaceae is part of the order Oxalidales, which is a group of flowering plants known for their distinctive fruit and leaf arrangements. Within the order Oxalidales, the family Bonnetiaceae is one of the smaller and less well-known groups. The classification of Bonnetia colombiana reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the plant kingdom.
